---
title: "Project Checkpoint 2"
---


Something students can do toward their project after week 2!

- give us $k$ data summaries using the existing columns in the data
- provide $n$ data summaries that modify the columns originally in the data
    * at least $m$ of these summaries need to include function
    * at least $m$ of these summaries need to include iteration
    
- presented nicely
    * link to **gt**?
